student state.mastery: Dictionary of skill names to float values between 0 and 1. Example: {'Linear Algebra': 0.75}
student state.accuracy: Dictionary of (skill, difficulty) to float accuracy values. Example: {('Linear Algebra', 'easy'): 0.9}
student state.failures: Dictionary of skill × difficulty to failed question ratio (0-1). Example: {('Linear Algebra', 'easy'): 0.2}

output.action: String. One of ['Failed Questions', 'Easy Questions', 'High-Aptitude Questions']
output.recommended questions: List of tuples. Each is a question identifier. Example: [('Q001', 'easy'), ('Q015', 'medium'), ('Q103', 'hard'), ('Q042', 'easy'), ('Q087', 'medium')]

note: This schema is shared by all tools.
